user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable position level paygrade support, so that pay grades can be tied to position levels during recruitment
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Position Level PayGrade screen; When I answer Yes to "Do you support position level paygrade ?" and click Save; Then the setting is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and continue to the next configuration, so that I can complete setup in sequence
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set the position level paygrade option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and the next screen opens
